completed_tasks.name: Fix mintBatch() payable gap + array length validation
Add withdraw exchangeRate guard + bridgeOut same-chain guard

decisions.decision: Kept payable modifier on mintBatch — diamond delegatecall compatibility requires it
decisions.rationale: Success criteria allows either removing payable OR adding require(msg.value == 0). Latter preserves compatibility

decisions.decision: Hoisted exchangeRate to local variable in withdraw()
decisions.rationale: Eliminates double storage read and makes validation explicit before division
opencode runtime doesn't support worktree isolation; subagent completion signals unreliable

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 4 to plan Phase 4: Access Control & Observability
context_notes: Phases 1-3 complete (6/6 plans). Phase 4 is next — harden admin-only code paths, add event emissions for super-admin bypass paths, enable Slither static analysis. Execution was smooth with sequential inline mode (parallelization: false). Only recurring issue: npm config incompatibility requires using yarn instead of npx for hardhat commands.
